heading: Change of name or location
label: 30 Change of name or location
notes: Amendments1999—Subsec. (d). added subsec. (d).Pub. L. 106–1021994—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 103–3281983—Subsec. (b).Pub. children.heading: Name change
children.label: a Name change
children.text: Any national banking association, upon written notice to the Comptroller of the Currency, may change its name, except that such new name shall include the word “National”.

children.heading: Location change
children.label: b Location change
children.text: Any national banking association, upon written notice to the Comptroller of the Currency, may change the location of its main office to any authorized branch location within the limits of the city, town, or village in which it is situated, or, with a vote of shareholders owning two-thirds of the stock of such association for a relocation outside such limits and upon receipt of a certificate of approval from the Comptroller of the Currency, to any other location within or outside the limits of the city, town, or village in which it is located, but not more than thirty miles beyond such limits.

children.heading: Coordination withsection 36 of this title
children.label: c Coordination withsection 36 of this title
children.text: In the case of a national bank which relocates the main office of such bank from 1 State to another State after , the bank may retain and operate branches within the State from which the bank relocated such office only to the extent authorized in .May 31, 1997section 36(e)(2) of this title

children.heading: Retention of “Federal” in name of converted Federal savings association
children.label: d Retention of “Federal” in name of converted Federal savings association

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a) or any other provision of law, any depository institution, the charter of which is converted from that of a Federal savings association to a national bank or a State bank after , may retain the term “Federal” in the name of such institution if such institution remains an insured depository institution.November 12, 1999

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: 2 Definitions
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the terms “depository institution”, “insured depository institution”, “national bank”, and “State bank” have the meanings given those terms in .section 1813 of this title
